original: GabMart Threadz fully believes in dressing for the occasion, whether it be a night of high society dining, quiet relaxation in the warmth of your corporate-approved housing, or satisfying the ever-present breeding urges that so many races struggle with. What better way to commemorate the creation of new life than wearing a pair of panties sure to drive your partner wild? Remember, for fun in bed, bring an egg. (c)\n\nNo sapient lifeforms were harmed in the manufacture of this latex.
